narrative_beat: Wide de familia silhuetas sentadas no chao de casa vazia, Biblia aberta no chao

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a family of indistinct silhouettes sitting on the floor of an empty home
subject.focal_point: an open Bible on the floor glowing warm in the center of the frame
subject.secondary: Cardboard boxes scattered, bare walls, father figure head in hands, mother and child huddled beside, open Bible emitting soft gold light.
props: open Bible glowing on bare floor

composition.foreground: open Bible in rich warm crimson and gold
composition.midground: family silhouettes in warm low amber
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white bare walls and boxes

lighting.key_light: warm glow from the Bible itself on floor
lighting.fill_light: cold blue ambient from uncovered window

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

narration_excerpt: Houve apenas pessoas arruinadas, com fe abalada, sem emprego, sem poupanca.
